race.comment: CLOSE TO MIDNIGHT (1) has not raced since showing pace then weakening over 1000m at the Caulfield Heath in November, the only run of that prep. In a new stable now and is trialling impressively. Good enough to take care of these despite the eight-month absence. BEYOND THE SKY (5) settled last then made a sustained run to get up for fourth when resuming over 1000m at Tamworth recently. Can improve sharply with that run under the belt and a senior rider replacing a 4kg claimer. THIRD BASE (2) led but found the promising Sobek a little too strong over this course and distance last time out. Needs luck from a wide draw but should be in the firing line for a long way. ANGIE'S SISTER (6) tired late when resuming at Warren last start and can offer a bit more resistance today.
